This is a testharness.js-based test.
[PRECONDITION_FAILED] A held lock on the main thread should not prevent bfcache
  Could have been BFCached but actually wasn't
[PRECONDITION_FAILED] A held lock on a worker should not prevent bfcache
  Could have been BFCached but actually wasn't
[PRECONDITION_FAILED] A held lock on a nested worker should not prevent bfcache
  Could have been BFCached but actually wasn't
[PRECONDITION_FAILED] A held lock on a shared worker should not prevent bfcache
  Could have been BFCached but actually wasn't
Harness: the test ran to completion.
